# Hicare (HicareNet Inc.)

> A Korea-based digital healthcare company operating a SaaS platform
> (Hicare Care Portal) for US Medicare Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM),
> Chronic Care Management (CCM), Advanced Primary Care Management (APCM),
> Annual Wellness Visits (AWV), and Value-Based Care (VBC).

Hicare is the brand of HicareNet Inc., a Korean digital healthcare company
spun off from InSung Information's healthcare division in 2020. The company
develops Hicare Care Portal — a SaaS platform that automates RPM, CCM,
APCM, AWV billing workflows for US clinics under CMS reimbursement rules.
As of 2024 overseas revenue accounts for 96.68% of total revenue, mostly
generated in the United States.

## Company

- Legal entity (Korea): 하이케어넷 주식회사 (HicareNet Inc.)
- Brand: Hicare (영문) / 하이케어 (한글)
- Headquarters: 28, Wiryeseong-daero 22-gil, Songpa-gu, Seoul, Korea
- US subsidiary: Hicare.net Inc. (Irvine, CA + San Jose, CA)
- Founded: 2020 (spin-off from InSung Information)
- Technology heritage: 20+ years of medical-device integration (120+ device types)
- Certifications: HIPAA, ISO 27001, ISO 27701

## Products and services

- [Hicare Care Portal](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/business.html): SaaS platform that automates CMS RPM/CCM/APCM billing and clinical workflows for US clinics
- [Hicare Hub](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/business.html): Gateway device for patient-home vital sign transmission (10,000+ units exported to the US VA program)
- [Hicare App](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/business.html): Patient-facing mobile app for RPM data capture
- Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription; clinics bill Medicare and pay Hicare a per-patient platform fee
- Typical clinic economics: $73–$147 per patient per month (2026 CMS codes included)

## Key pages

- [About](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/about.html): Company overview, mission, history, organization
- [Business](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/business.html): Hicare Care Portal details, RPM/CCM/APCM workflows, device exports
- [Technology](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/technology.html): Cloud SaaS architecture, AI-powered medical data analysis, security certifications
- [Global Track Record](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/global.html): Operations across US, Italy, France, Thailand (40 clinics, 3,000+ patients, 14,000+ gateway devices)
- [IR/Newsroom](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/ir.html): Financial status, revenue trends, market opportunity
- [Careers](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/careers.html): Open positions (R&D, BI, Management Support)
- [FAQ](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/faq.html): Investor, job applicant, and partner questions
- [Contact](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/contact.html): Inquiry form for investment, careers, partnerships
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/privacy.html): Personal-information protection policy (effective 2026-05-01)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.hicare.co.kr/new/terms.html): Website terms of service (effective 2026-05-01)

## Key facts (2024–2026)

- 40 US clinics under contract
- 3,000+ patients under remote management
- 300+ insurance claims processed per month
- 14,000+ gateway devices cumulatively exported
- Overseas revenue share: 96.68%
- 2024 overseas revenue: USD 998,404
- 2025 H1 overseas revenue: USD 816,668

## Regulatory and clinical context

- Operates under US CMS reimbursement codes: CPT 99453, 99454, 99457, 99458 (RPM); 99487, 99489, 99490, 99491 (CCM); plus 2026 new APCM codes
- Clinics own FDA-approved medical devices; Hicare does not supply or integrate devices directly
- Architecture designed around FHIR-based interoperability

- Corporate email: contact@hicare.co.kr
- Phone: +82-2-3400-7247
- US site: https://www.hicare.net
